title: stelis asperrima
intro: Stelis asperrima, also known as the "Scrub Stelis", is a type of flowering orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Stelis asperrima lie in its roots and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Stelis asperrima are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe sore throats, reduce swelling, and combat bacterial infections. In herbal preparations, Stelis asperrima is often combined with other plants to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
